prevalence.trend: stable to increasing in some countries with higher availability

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; assessment includes comorbidity screening and functional impairment

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; integrated screening in primary care/emergency settings in some countries
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with access to addiction services; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Addiction services and mental health services often integrated for dual diagnosis
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychosocial interventions; harm reduction; comorbidity management; no specific approved pharmacotherapy
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Service demand and variability across member states
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established addiction medicine systems and EMCDDA monitoring in many countries
